lane.requested_action_label: Publish the current branch to payments-prod.

lifecycle.state_label: Passkey active on this device's authenticator.
lifecycle.client_scope_label: Step-up for one risky write action: publish to payments-prod.

outcome.fallback_label: No fallback required; passkey satisfied the lane.

target_action_preservation.preservation_label: Step-up satisfied for the original publish action; target identity preserved.

authority_scope_summary_label: Requested step-up authority for one publish action; granted scope equals requested.
plain_language_summary: Step-up lane satisfied on payments-prod: the local authenticator's passkey approved one publish action, the original target was preserved, and no scope widened beyond step-up.

lane.requested_action_label: Resume managed sign-in after refresh expired.

lifecycle.state_label: Current platform does not support WebAuthn; passkey unavailable.
lifecycle.client_scope_label: Reauth scope: refresh the managed session without widening.

outcome.outcome_label: Fallback engaged because WebAuthn is unsupported on this platform.
outcome.fallback_label: Resume after a typed step-up via system browser.

target_action_preservation.preservation_label: Fallback resumes the same managed-sign-in target; target identity preserved.

authority_scope_summary_label: Reauth pending; the fallback path opens before scope is granted.
plain_language_summary: Reauth lane on payments-prod with an unsupported platform: the row names resume-after-step-up-in-system-browser as the fallback, preserves the original managed-sign-in target, and grants no scope until the fallback completes.

lifecycle.state_label: Passkey revoked after device loss; rebind required.
lifecycle.client_scope_label: Recovery scope: rebind authenticator on the existing account.

outcome.outcome_label: Admin policy denies passkey rebind on this row.
outcome.fallback_label: Contact your admin to complete recovery; an out-of-band flow will rebind your account.

target_action_preservation.preservation_label: Recovery downscoped to read-only on the same workspace; the original target identity is preserved.

authority_scope_summary_label: Recovery denied passkey rebind; granted read-only until the admin flow completes.
plain_language_summary: Recovery lane on payments-prod: admin policy denies passkey rebind, the row names contact-admin-for-recovery as the fallback, preserves the original recovery target, and downscopes to read-only without widening beyond the requested scope.

lifecycle.state_label: Account-free local mode: no passkey lifecycle to track.
lifecycle.client_scope_label: Account-free local mode grants no remote scope.

outcome.outcome_label: No passkey lane on account-free local rows.
outcome.fallback_label: Account-free local rows need no fallback path.

target_action_preservation.preservation_label: Account-free local row: no target / action identity to preserve.

authority_scope_summary_label: Account-free local mode grants no remote scope.
plain_language_summary: Account-free local row: no passkey lane is claimed, no fallback is required, and no remote scope is granted; local editing remains the source of truth.
